content.headline: Dentistry shouldn't be scary. Let's fix that.
content.subheadline: Led by Dr. Sarah Kim, an endodontist with 18 years of experience making nervous patients feel at home. Family & cosmetic dentistry in downtown Denver. New patients welcome — same-day appointments and anxiety-friendly care.

content.headline: Complete dental care under one roof
content.subheadline: Dr. Kim believes every patient deserves a dentist who listens, explains everything, and never rushes. Here's what we offer:

features.title: Preventive Care
features.description: Gentle cleanings and exams that actually feel good. We catch problems early so you avoid pain and big procedures later. No judgment, just care.

features.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
features.description: Teeth whitening, veneers, and smile design that looks natural and feels like you. We work with you to create the smile you've always wanted.

features.title: Family Friendly
features.description: Kids love coming here. We make first visits fun and anxiety-free. Parents trust us with their whole family — infants through grandparents.

features.title: Invisalign & Orthodontics
features.description: Straighten your teeth discreetly without metal brackets. Comes off for eating and brushing — life doesn't stop during treatment.

features.title: Dental Implants
features.description: Permanent tooth replacement that functions like a real tooth. We guide you through every step so you know exactly what to expect.

features.title: Emergency Care
features.description: Toothache at midnight? Broken tooth before a big event? We keep same-day slots open and will see you fast. Because dental emergencies can't wait.

testimonials.quote: I was terrified of the dentist. Dr. Kim spent 20 minutes just talking with me before my first root canal. She explained everything step-by-step, and honestly? It wasn't scary at all. I've been coming back for 5 years now — she's the reason I finally take care of my teeth.
testimonials.author: Jessica Torres

testimonials.quote: I did Invisalign with Dr. Kim and my smile is completely transformed. Everyone notices. The whole process was so easy — she checked in every month and answered every question. Two years later, my teeth are still perfect.
testimonials.author: David Park

testimonials.quote: My kids, Emma and Lucas, actually ask to go to the dentist now. They love the team there. Dr. Kim is patient, makes them feel safe, and never treats them like they're nervous. As a parent, that's everything.
testimonials.author: Maria Santos

items.question: Do you accept my insurance?
items.answer: Yep, we work with all the major plans. When you call to book, we'll verify your coverage and go over your benefits with you. No surprises. We also work with patients who don't have insurance — check out our payment options below.

items.question: I'm really nervous about the dentist. What happens on my first visit?
items.answer: We get it. We start by just talking — no pressure. You'll meet Dr. Kim and the team. Then we do a gentle exam, take some digital X-rays, and talk through any concerns you have. Your first appointment is about an hour. We never rush, and we explain everything as we go. Lots of patients come in anxious and leave feeling so much better.

items.question: What if I have a dental emergency?
items.answer: Call us right away — we have same-day emergency slots. Whether it's a toothache, broken tooth, or lost filling, we'll work you in usually within a few hours. Dental pain is real, and you shouldn't have to wait.

items.question: What if I can't afford a big procedure?
items.answer: We offer flexible payment plans so you can spread costs over time. We also partner with financing companies for bigger treatments. And yes, we give a discount for cash payment if you're able. The point is: cost shouldn't stop you from getting the care you need. Talk to our team and we'll find something that works.

content.headline: No surprise bills. No hidden fees.
content.subheadline: Dr. Kim believes you deserve to know exactly what something costs before you commit. We're upfront, transparent, and we work with you to make quality care affordable. No judgment. No surprises.

plans.name: Preventive
plans.description: Keep your teeth healthy and avoid bigger problems down the road

plans.name: Cosmetic
plans.description: A smile you're actually proud to show off
features: Smile design consultation (see your new smile before treatment)

plans.name: Restorative
plans.description: Restore function and beauty when teeth need serious repair
features: Dental implants (permanent, like a real tooth)
Root canal therapy (save a tooth from extraction)

items.question: What if insurance doesn't cover my procedure?
items.answer: We get it — insurance can be complicated. We'll give you a full cost estimate upfront. Then we work with you. Most patients qualify for payment plans, and we can spread bigger procedures over several months. You're never on your own figuring this out.

items.question: Can I finance a big procedure like implants?
items.answer: Absolutely. We partner with CareCredit and other financing companies so you can do low-interest payment plans. Interest-free options available for 6-12 months if you qualify. Just ask us — we'll walk through the options.

items.question: Do you give a discount if I pay cash?
items.answer: Yes, we give a small courtesy discount for cash or credit card payment at the time of treatment. Ask our team for the exact amount — it varies by procedure.

content.headline: Let's take care of your smile
content.subheadline: New patients welcome. Book online or call us — we have same-day slots available, and we'll make sure your first visit feels comfortable and anxiety-free.
